Welcome to '''Wiki Almanac'''.

This mini wiki is powered directly by [[MediaWiki]].

== Start Here ==
* [[Lord of the Rings]]
* [[:Category:Characters]]
* [[:Category:Places]]
* [[:Category:Artifacts]]
* [[Special:AllPages]]
* [[Special:Categories]]

== About ==
This starter setup is meant to prove a topic wiki can come to life quickly using real MediaWiki pages, categories, talk pages, and special pages out of the box.
